title: Eskom enforces twice-daily load reduction schedule in Cape Town this week
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - Several Cape Town communities continue to experience scheduled electricity outages as Eskom enforces load reduction protocols throughout the metropolitan area.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - Several Cape Town communities continue to experience scheduled electricity outages as Eskom enforces load reduction protocols throughout the metropolitan area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These power cuts operate on a daily basis from Monday through Sunday, even though national load shedding has been suspended.","html":"These power cuts operate on a daily basis from Monday through Sunday, even though national load shedding has been suspended."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Daily load reduction schedule"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents in affected areas face electricity disruptions twice each day.","html":"Residents in affected areas face electricity disruptions twice each day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The outages last approximately four hours during morning periods and five hours during evening periods, following Eskom’s structured load reduction timetable.","html":"The outages last approximately four hours during morning periods and five hours during evening periods, following Eskom’s structured load reduction timetable."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Current load reduction areas"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Cape communities affected by Eskom’s load reduction schedule are organised into two operational blocks, with power cuts occurring during morning and evening peak periods.","html":"Western Cape communities affected by Eskom’s load reduction schedule are organised into two operational blocks, with power cuts occurring during morning and evening peak periods."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The schedule maintains consistent daily timing, enabling residents to plan around predictable outage periods.","html":"The schedule maintains consistent daily timing, enabling residents to plan around predictable outage periods."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Block A areas:","html":"Block A areas:"},{"type":"list","items":["Philippi East","Crossroads","Klipfontein","Mfuleni"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Block B areas:","html":"Block B areas:"},{"type":"list","items":["Philippi","Crossroads","Klipfontein","Eersterivier","Mfuleni","Highgate (Silversands)","Part of Airport Industrial","Khaya","Mandela Park (Khayelitsha)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Eskom infrastructure protection measures"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eskom has clarified that these power cuts stem from equipment protection concerns rather than general electricity shortages.","html":"Eskom has clarified that these power cuts stem from equipment protection concerns rather than general electricity shortages."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The utility company implements load reduction between 05:00 and 09:00 and 17:00 and 22:00 to safeguard critical infrastructure from damage.","html":"The utility company implements load reduction between 05:00 and 09:00 and 17:00 and 22:00 to safeguard critical infrastructure from damage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Illegal connections and electricity theft burden transformer load. While load shedding remains suspended, Eskom implements load reduction from 05:00 and 09:00 and 17:00 and 22:00,” the utility stated.","html":"“Illegal connections and electricity theft burden transformer load. While load shedding remains suspended, Eskom implements load reduction from 05:00 and 09:00 and 17:00 and 22:00,” the utility stated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The utility previously emphasised that these measures are essential for infrastructure preservation.","html":"The utility previously emphasised that these measures are essential for infrastructure preservation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The continued pressure on our transformers/mini-substations due to illegal connections and electricity theft in some areas necessitates load reduction to avoid equipment damage,” added Eskom, “","html":"“The continued pressure on our transformers/mini-substations due to illegal connections and electricity theft in some areas necessitates load reduction to avoid equipment damage,” added Eskom, “"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This week’s schedule"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All affected communities will experience power cuts at uniform times throughout the current week:","html":"All affected communities will experience power cuts at uniform times throughout the current week:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Morning cuts: 05:00 to 07:00 dailyEvening cuts: 17:00 to 19:00 daily","html":"Morning cuts: 05:00 to 07:00 daily
Evening cuts: 17:00 to 19:00 daily"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Eskom enforces twice-daily load reduction schedule in Cape Town this week
